pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take:
**I think we all understand that drafting a team like Uzbekistan was never going to end well, bless Rafe's heart.** Look, when you pick your teams out of a hat, expecting a strategic masterpiece might be a stretch, but I admire "The Noisemaker's" enthusiasm more than his skill. With Germany's shaky performances, he might want his son to give the draft board a few pointers before the next World Cup. That being said, the Switzerland vs. Canada matchup pits Zach's steady hand with "Mustard Boy" against Gunner's avid, if somewhat straightforward, confidence in "Bubba G". I get why someone would invest in Canada for a tournament held on North American soil, but sometimes home advantage isn't worth much more than an overpriced souvenir. Expect Switzerland to control the game and snatch a victory, because logic, unlike sentiment, tends to win out in the end.

Devin, or should I say "Ghost Pepper," might want to rethink his approach when it comes to managing his drafts. Look, I feel for him, I really do, but when you pick Haiti expecting them to upset teams like Morocco, it's hard to hold back a bemused chuckle. Morocco's solid form suggests it'll be a straightforward affair, with Devin shaking his head, wondering where it all went wrong. Meanwhile, Gayden’s "Backpass Assassin" persona may suggest a cautious approach, but with Korea Republic up against Devin’s South Africa, a more proactive style might be just what the doctor ordered. I think it's safe to say that Gayden will come out swinging today, leaving Devin to ponder yet another missed opportunity in his well-meaning but ultimately flawed draft strategy.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Ghana Earns Point Without Scoring Against England
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach credits the draw to extensive mustard yellow training kits.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Ranks Last Despite Drafting Top-Tier England
pundit_takes.subtitle: "It’s not about scoring, it’s about the art of the draw," Gayden notes.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Poised for Victory with Bosnia Facing Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin banking on mild opposition to spice up his points tally.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Set to Dominate as Canada Hosts Switzerland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner claims home ice will ensure a freezing of Zach's hopes.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's losing streak is the only thing dropping faster than his favorite status.
Rafe's draft blunders are as epic as his youthful ignorance makes them hilarious.
Rafe ties with Gayden, making Thanksgiving dinner feel like a FIFA final.
Devin's model accuracy means he's winning simulations, but will reality grant him a trophy?
